title: Conduits fabric smp modpack
description: a crazy modpack that runs off your own dedicated server, mixes ice and fire, cobblemon, create and more into one caotic modpack
body:
This is a brandnew take on a fabric based minecraft smp mod pack. it works both client side and server side. hope you like it!!!
it includes
ice and fire 
create
applied energistics
valkerian skies, and its addons eureka and clock work for create.

its easy to use and light weight enough where you wont have any problems running it off server side with friends, or even client side.
